questions.question: A shopkeeper buys an article for Rs. 400 and sells it for Rs. 500. Find the profit percentage.
A can do a work in 10 days and B in 15 days. Working together, in how many days will they finish it?
questions.explanation: Combined one-day work = 1/10 + 1/15 = 3/30 + 2/30 = 5/30 = 1/6. So they finish in 6 days.

questions.question: Statements: All cats are dogs. All dogs are animals. Which conclusion follows? 'All cats are animals.'
questions.explanation: Since all cats are dogs and all dogs are animals, all cats must be animals. The conclusion follows.

questions.question: If A > B and B > C, which of the following is definitely true?
questions.explanation: If A > B and B > C, then by transitivity A > C.

questions.question: Spot the error: 'He (A)/ don't (B)/ like coffee (C)/ No error (D)'
questions.explanation: With the singular subject 'He', the correct form is 'doesn't', not 'don't'.

questions.question: The repo rate in India is decided by which institution?
questions.explanation: The repo rate is decided by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) through its Monetary Policy Committee.
